title: Uten Rotatable Old Fashioned Crystal Whiskey Glass, 275ml/10oz, with Wood Coaster, Thickened Base, Perfect for Rum, Cocktail, Coffee, Milk - 1 Piece
features: [Creative Gift] The uniquely handcrafted glass makes a great gift for family and friends, perfect for family gatherings, bars and restaurants etc.
[Quality Craftsmanship] The rotating glass cup is made from crystal glass with hand painted and a thickened base, comfortable to hold and easy to clean.
[Tumbler Design] Hemispherical bottom, with wooden coaster allows free rotation, quick mixing of drinks, while helping to relieve stress. Even without the coaster, it will not tip over.
[Large Capacity] 275ml/10oz, enough to hold ice cubes and ice balls, can be used as a water glass, whiskey tumbler, rum glass, cocktail glass, vodka glass, coffee cup, milk cup, juice cup, etc.
[Multiple Choices] Multiple textures and hand-painted designs give you different experiences.
[Friendly Hint] Hand-painted cup, not dishwasher safe.
